page.title: Beursault score entry
page.description: Enter honours and point zones for Beursault competitions.

status.invalidHelp: The number of honours exceeds the allowed number of arrows. Check zones 1 to 4.

empty: Select a session and target range.

warning.notBeursault: This module is only available for SetFrBeursault tournaments.

intro: Enter Beursault scores target by target. Rows load automatically when you change session; press Enter to jump to the next cell.
